name: zhulong-plugin
description: Zhulong (烛龙): Docker-first autonomous security audit plugin with dynamic toolchain planning and deterministic vulnerability report generation.

interface.shortDescription: Docker-first security auditing with deterministic reporting.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Zhulong (烛龙) workflow into a plugin-friendly structure with runtime checks, dynamic toolchain planning, Docker-only verification, and stable DOCX bundle generation.
defaultPrompt: Use the zhulong workflow to audit this repository and verify real vulnerabilities only inside Docker.
Plan the best toolchain for this repo, run the Docker-only verification workflow, and generate stable confirmed vulnerability bundles.
Check the local security tooling stack, choose the best available scanners, and validate the final report bundles.
